description: Style NoteFor the man who combines style and comfort, this casual checked shirt from the flying machine collection is a must buy. Crafted from soft cotton fabric, this shirt offers exemplary comfort and is sure to become a wardrobe favourite. Pair it with denims and boots, thrown on a biker jacket and conquer the world in style.Product DetailsWhite shirt that has a mandarin collar, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, spread collar with buttoned placket on the front, patch pocket on the left chest, brand logo embroidered above the pocket and a curved hemlineMaterial and Care100% cottonDelicate machine wash in cold water with like colours using a mild detergentDo not tumble dryDry inside out in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
